prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-NAILCLIPSET-3PC-71213 Product Type: NAIL_CLIPPER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Nail Clipper Set with Emery Board Nail File Travel Manicure Kit - 3pc Description: Keep your nails groomed and trimmed at home or on the go with the ToolTreaux travel nail kit. Our kit of basic nail tools comes with a classic nail clipper and 2 emery board nail files so you can touch up your manicure or remove a broken nail if needed. The clipper features ultra-sharped curved blades to safely and easily cut your nails without damaging your skin.

The nail clippers are made of durable, corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won't rust so you can count on them for many uses. Each of the nail files is made of flexible emery that is essentially sandpaper designed to be safe for use on your body.

The included nail clippers feature an ergonomic handle to provide comfort and prevent slippage during use. They feature a chrome-polished sleek surface that is both simple yet fashionable, so they'll easily fit with any of your other manicure tools.

All of the pieces included in the travel nail kit are lightweight, compact, and easy to carry, making this an ideal set for bringing to work, school, or on trips in case you need to touch your nails up on the go. Don't get caught with a snagged nail or hang nail while out and about - just keep this set in your purse or bag for quick and easy access if needed. Search Terms: nail clipper nail clipper set straight nail clipper nail kit travel nail kit travel nail file nail file nail file and buffer emery board manicure set manicure kit manicure tools french manicure kit manicure scissors beauty tools and accessories Features: - 3PC NAIL CLIPPER SET - ToolTreaux nail kit comes with a basic nail clipper and 2 emery board nail files to keep nails trimmed and groomed at home or on the go. Clipper features ultra-sharp blades to safely and easily cut nails without damaging your skin - PREMIUM DESIGN - Nail clipper is made of durable, high-quality corrosion-resistant stainless steel that won't rust so you can count on them to last; Nail files are made of flexible emery, essentially sandpaper that is safe for use on your body - ERGONOMIC GRIP - Nail clippers feature an ergonomic handle to provide comfort and prevent slippage during use; Chrome-polished surface is both simple yet fashionable; Fits right in with your other manicure tools - COMPACT TRAVEL NAIL KIT - All pieces are compact, lightweight, and easy to carry, making this an ideal set for travel; Bring the nail kit with you to work, school, or on trips in case you need to touch your nails up or remove a broken nail on-the-go - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: stainless steel, emery (nail files); Number of pieces: 3; Weight: .05 pounds (.8 ounces); Colors: chrome, brown; Ergonomic handle; Blade edge: curved === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 3-Pc Nail Clipper Set with Emery Board Files

tokens.name: Nail Clipper Set with Emery Board Files

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Clipper, 2 Emery Files, Ergonomic Grip, Travel Kit, Ultra-Sharp Curved Blades

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Curved Blades, Includes 2 Emery Board Files, Ergonomic Grip, Compact Travel Manicure Kit
